changes.newValue: Added submitted_at migration. New /api/asteroid/submit route (score=40+annotations*8). Asteroid page now shows daily-seeded single target, Submit Survey button, score on completion. Removed 'Secondary Puzzle Preview' label.

snapshot.title: Upgrade asteroid lab to daily scored game
snapshot.description: Game 2 is currently a preview with no daily scoring or streaks. Seed today's asteroid anomaly selection by date (same pattern as Game 1), add a submit flow that records a score, and integrate with the daily_plays table. Remove 'Secondary Puzzle Preview' label.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Asteroid anomaly selection is deterministic by date (seeded)
Submitting annotations records a score to daily_plays
Asteroid game contributes to streak calculation
Preview label removed, game presented as a proper daily mission step
